hard_gates: all required output keys are present
owner decision refs are preserved without approval semantics

source text, chunks, excerpts, NotebookLM answer payloads, Drive mutation, embeddings, BM25/vector payloads, host absolute paths, source truth, answer authority, owner approval, ontology/canon promotion, and default-route switch are excluded
candidate does not claim commands, file reads, file edits, or real refresh execution
preferred_primary_rule: lowest-cost and fastest candidate among quality-gate passes unless quality difference is 10 points or more
